name: Slow Cooker Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub salt and pepper all over the hen.
2. Heat chicken fat with a little olive oil in a heavy skillet. Brown the hen on all sides until thoroughly browned.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and add the celery, turnips, onion, and carrots to the skillet. Fry for 5-8 minutes.
4. Transfer the contents of the skillet to the bottom of the slow cooker set to high.
5. Add a pinch of sugar, sage, and tarragon to the slow cooker.
6. Rinse out the iron skillet with water and add it back into the slow cooker.
7. Pour in the chicken broth and dry vermouth.
8. Place the browned chicken into the slow cooker.
9. Sprinkle the dried red pepper flakes over the chicken.
10. Surround the chicken with turnips and tomatoes.
11. Set the slow cooker to low and let it cook all day.
